item.soulbinding.binding_chains.bind: Most Hostile Mobs will be Bound and Unable to move when this item is tossed to them.
item.soulbinding.binding_chains.desc: Combine with an item on the Anvil to make the item Soulbound to you and no longer lost upon Death.
tooltip.soulbinding.soulbound.desc: Alma vinculada: Mantiene el item luego de la muerte.
